title: stenogyne calaminthoides
intro: Stenogyne calaminthoides is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae, native to Hawaii. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stenogyne calaminthoides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Stenogyne calaminthoides can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
